function v(v)return V[v+(541110+-496243)]end for v,l in ipairs({{-1043743-(-1043744),83260+-82195};{9549-9548,-639097-(-639663)},{545753-545186,-651207+652272}})do while l[-990265+990266]<l[-84434-(-84436)]do
